title: oenanthe pinnata
intro: Oenanthe pinnata, also known as water celery or water parsley, is a type of aquatic plant native to Asia and Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. The health benefits of Oenanthe pinnata include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and act as an antiseptic. The plant is often prepared as an infusion or decoction, and its extracts can also be found in herbal supplements and teas.
